rows.displayName: Arturo Fuente Fuente Fuente Opus X Varies
rows.wrapperRole: Dominican sun-grown wrapper delivers OpusX signature spice, sweetness, and the prestige of an estate-grown puro cover leaf.
rows.binderRole: Dominican binder integrates the puro structure and supports Fuente's precise, celebration-grade construction.
rows.fillerRole: Dominican filler provides cedar, baking spice, dried fruit, and layered complexity without outside tobacco.
rows.flavorNotes: Cedar, baking spice, leather, sweet tobacco, dried fruit, subtle cream, oak.
rows.bestFor: Collector, Fuente/OpusX fan, experienced smoker, celebration, cognac pairing, Dominican puro prestige.
rows.avoidIf: Beginner, nicotine-sensitive, budget-sensitive, user needs easy daily availability or a short smoke window.
rows.whyRecommend: Recommend when prestige, rarity, and a refined full-bodied Dominican puro are the goal—not blunt ligero shock.
rows.catalogLine: Arturo Fuente Fuente Fuente Opus X Perfecxion X · 5¼ × 42 · Petite Corona · Full · Dominican · $32 · Notes: cedar, baking spice, leather, sweet tobacco
rows.priceNote: Line has many vitolas; MSRP for Petite Corona class; larger formats $40+.
rows.sizeNote: Many vitolas; listed size is Petite Corona class. Toro/Robusto larger.

rows.wrapperRole: Dominican sun-grown wrapper adds caramelized sweetness, graham, and restrained spice from Fuente estate leaf.
rows.binderRole: Dominican binder keeps the all-Dominican blend coherent and elegantly constructed.
rows.fillerRole: Dominican filler supplies cedar, molasses, cocoa, and medium-full body with signature Fuente polish.
rows.flavorNotes: Graham cracker, cedar, cocoa, molasses, black pepper, toasted nuts, sweet spice.
rows.bestFor: Celebration, port pairing, experienced smoker wanting luxury Dominican richness without OpusX collector pricing.
rows.avoidIf: Beginner on empty stomach, user wants mild Connecticut cream only, or lowest nicotine.
rows.whyRecommend: Recommend as a top-tier Dominican reserve—rich, smooth, and celebratory (often called the "velvet hammer").
rows.catalogLine: Ashton ESG Churchill · 7¼ × 52 · Churchill · Full · Dominican · $18 · Notes: graham cracker, cedar, cocoa, molasses
rows.sizeNote: Line also: Robusto, Toro — ring/length vary.

rows.wrapperRole: Cameroon wrapper contributes honeyed sweetness, baking spice, and aromatic texture unique to African leaf.
rows.binderRole: Dominican binder supports figurado construction and even burn through shaped formats.
rows.fillerRole: Dominican filler keeps the profile medium-bodied with cedar, earth, brown sugar, and approachable Fuente balance.
rows.flavorNotes: Cedar, brown sugar, baking spice, toast, nuts, light earth, subtle cream.
rows.bestFor: After dinner, rum pairing, craftsmanship/figurado lesson; Short Story for shorter window.
rows.avoidIf: User dislikes figurados, wants full ligero power, or needs the lowest nicotine in the book.
rows.whyRecommend: Recommend to teach Fuente figurado skill and Cameroon sweetness in a medium, approachable package.
rows.catalogLine: Arturo Fuente Hemingway Short Story · 4 × 49 · Figurado · Medium · Dominican · $8 · Notes: cedar, brown sugar, baking spice, toast
rows.priceNote: Figurado family; Short Story MSRP; Signature/Churchill higher.
rows.sizeNote: Figurado family: Signature, Churchill, etc. — length varies.

rows.wrapperRole: Connecticut Shade wrapper delivers cream, cedar, almond, and soft sweetness with premium Dominican polish.
rows.binderRole: Dominican binder maintains smooth burn and Fuente-made consistency.
rows.fillerRole: Dominican filler provides gentle body, nuts, light spice, and reliable mild-to-medium character.
rows.flavorNotes: Cream, cedar, almonds, toast, light spice, faint sweetness.
rows.bestFor: Beginner, morning coffee, mild luxury, user wants smooth Dominican Connecticut.
rows.avoidIf: User wants pepper-forward power, dark maduro body, or collector scarcity story.
rows.whyRecommend: Recommend when the user needs a polished, beginner-safe Dominican Connecticut profile.
rows.catalogLine: Ashton Classic Magnum · 7 × 50 · Magnum · Medium-Light · Dominican · $11 · Notes: cream, cedar, almonds, toast
rows.sizeNote: Several sizes; Magnum is representative long smoke.

rows.wrapperRole: Connecticut Shade wrapper gives grassy sweetness, cream, and classic Cuban-legacy mildness.
rows.binderRole: Dominican binder supports approachable, consistent construction from Tabacalera de García.
rows.fillerRole: Dominican filler reinforces cedar, nuts, light coffee, and easy-drinking mild body.
rows.flavorNotes: Cream, cedar, nuts, grassy sweetness, light coffee, mild spice.
rows.bestFor: Beginner, morning coffee, Cuban-heritage mild profile, first widely known premium classic.
rows.avoidIf: User wants bold pepper, dark maduro, or boutique Nicaraguan intensity.
rows.whyRecommend: Recommend as a widely available mild Dominican classic with broad beginner appeal.
rows.catalogLine: Montecristo Classic / Dominican Toro · 6 × 52 · Toro · Light · Dominican · $9 · Notes: cream, cedar, nuts, grassy sweetness
rows.priceNote: Dominican Classic line; vitola varies by SKU.
rows.sizeNote: Classic line has multiple vitolas; Toro listed.

rows.wrapperRole: Ecuador Connecticut wrapper adds elegance, cream, and refined aromatic top notes.
rows.binderRole: Dominican binder preserves Davidoff's clean construction and balanced mild character.
rows.fillerRole: Dominican filler offers subtle nuts, cedar, coffee-with-cream, and low-intensity luxury complexity.
rows.flavorNotes: Cedar, nuts, cream, coffee, soft spice, floral notes, light toast.
rows.bestFor: Celebration, cognac pairing, luxury gift, user wants prestige without strength.
rows.avoidIf: User equates luxury with full strength, wants pepper-heavy body, or is budget-sensitive.
rows.whyRecommend: Recommend to show that prestige can be gentle, refined, and low-intensity.
rows.catalogLine: Davidoff Aniversario Churchill · 7 × 50 · Churchill · Medium-Light · Dominican · $28 · Notes: cedar, nuts, cream, coffee
rows.memberBlurb: Davidoff elegance without punching you in the chest — nuts, cream, and coffee-with-cream in refined construction. Prestige that stays gentle.
rows.sizeNote: Aniversario line — Churchill representative; other sizes available.

rows.wrapperRole: Cameroon wrapper adds wood, leather texture, and classic aromatic sweetness.
rows.binderRole: Indonesian Jember binder adds supple body and savory depth under the Cameroon top leaf.
rows.fillerRole: Dominican Piloto Cubano filler provides cedar, cream, black pepper, and medium Cuban-legacy character.
rows.flavorNotes: Cedar, cream, black pepper, wood, leather, toast, subtle sweetness.
rows.bestFor: After dinner, Scotch pairing, medium heritage prestige, recognizable brand without OpusX pricing.
rows.avoidIf: User wants creamy mildness only, Cuban island product (clarify: Red Dot is DR-made), or lowest price point.
rows.whyRecommend: Recommend for medium-bodied Dominican prestige with Cameroon texture—U.S.-legal alternative to Cuban Cohiba story.
rows.catalogLine: Cohiba Dominican / Red Dot Robusto · 5 × 50 · Robusto · Medium · Dominican · $14 · Notes: cedar, cream, black pepper, wood
rows.memberBlurb: Cameroon texture and Dominican Piloto body — cedar, cream, and black pepper. Heritage prestige without OpusX money (U.S.-legal DR Cohiba).
rows.priceNote: Dominican Red Dot; not island Cuban.
rows.sizeNote: Red Dot line — multiple vitolas; Robusto representative.

rows.wrapperRole: Indonesian TBN wrapper sets top-note, color, and burn for this vitola.
rows.binderRole: Dominican Republic binder supports structure and integration with the filler.
rows.fillerRole: Dominican Republic / Nicaragua filler drives body, strength, and the flavor arc Sterlon should echo.
rows.avoidIf: Opposite wrapper lesson needed, or user wants island Cuban only.
rows.whyRecommend: Recommend when teaching Reserve identity, AJ/Aganorsa progression, or transcript-priority catalog coverage.
rows.sizeNote: Entry/deal line; L3-RYJ-1875 and CUR-15 are other RYJ tiers.

rows.fillerRole: Honduras / Nicaragua filler drives body, strength, and the flavor arc Sterlon should echo.
rows.avoidIf: Beginner seeking ultra-mild only when strength is medium-full or full.
rows.whyRecommend: Recommend when teaching Man O' War 10th Anniversary identity, AJ/Aganorsa progression, or transcript-priority catalog coverage.
